closure_text: Containment isolated 35 affected units; supplier notified and incoming inspection tightened.
Material lot quarantined pending CoA review; disposition set to use-as-is after engineering waiver.
Sampling error under AQL plan corrected; inspector re-qualified on the revised sampling table.
Root cause traced to a mislabeled fixture on line 5; operator retrained and check sheet revised.
Process deviation from a missed cleaning step; 5S audit added to the shift changeover checklist.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 12; recalibrated and verified against standard.
